scenario_results.reason: The lane advanced normal fresh-department opening execution only when task, par, temperature, date-mark, label, inventory, and completion evidence aligned across named records.
Missing department, product, prep, date-marking, and temperature prerequisites produced a blocked-state exception summary instead of improvised execution.
The lane refused closure without fresh-case closeout artifacts and preserved an auditable open or blocked state.
Temperature and date-marking exceptions triggered hold, rework, and food-safety escalation rather than normal service-ready closure.
Random-weight price conflicts between scale label, POS, and promotion records were escalated to pricing authority rather than overridden.
Order, payment, and substitution mismatches blocked fresh pickup release and routed to the correct order, payment, or guest-services owner.
Refund and service-recovery policy exceptions outside delegated authority were refused and packaged for the authorized owner.
Illness, foreign-material, incomplete lot, and potential fraud signals preserved evidence and escalated rather than being adjudicated in-lane.
High-volume fresh-department execution retained department-level readiness, service, blocker, supply, and rework traceability.
The lane preserved realistic grocery fresh terminology and artifact shapes instead of generic store-operations language.
Requests for process approval, recall clearance, and corrective-action certification were rejected and routed to adjacent authority owners.
Conflicting public, local, and tenant policy signals were recorded as precedence conflicts requiring human resolution.
Stricter tenant lot, markdown, and pull-and-hold controls were applied without weakening the public baseline or inventing authority.

notes: All 13 scenarios passed against the standard 0.90 threshold with complete ability coverage for the execution-processing-and-fulfillment and retail-consumer-and-hospitality contract.
The package stays inside fresh-department execution and does not claim pricing, refund, food-safety, fraud, legal, or executive authority outside the lane.
